title: mentha × stachyoides var. malinvaldii
intro: Mentha × stachyoides var. malinvaldii, also known as peppermint, is a hybrid plant species of the mint family, characterized by its distinctive minty aroma and flavor. The medicinal properties of Mentha × stachyoides var. malinvaldii include its ability to ease digestion, reduce nausea, and alleviate headaches due to its natural oils, particularly menthol and menthone. The health benefits of peppermint include relief from irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), improved respiratory function, and a reduction in stress and anxiety levels. In herbal preparations, peppermint is commonly used as a tea, oil, or capsule to harness its medicinal properties, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its benefits.
